prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
You've got this.

Yeah, that task feels heavy, overwhelming, maybe even a little scary—that’s why you’ve been putting it off. But here’s the truth: you’re stronger than the resistance. That voice saying *later*? It’s just fear dressed up as comfort.

The hardest part is starting. So take one small step. Just one. Open the document. Write one sentence. Make one call. Momentum builds momentum.

You don’t have to be perfect—just be brave enough to begin. You’ve handled hard things before. This is just another one you’re about to crush.

Now go. Show yourself what you’re made of.  
I believe in you—now believe in *you*. 💪🔥
